name: Trade Flow Exhaustion into Stable Book
hypothesis: An extreme spike in buyer-initiated trade flow often signals exhaustion, predicting a price reversal (mean reversion). This effect should be stronger when the book is stable and deep (low concentration on both bid and ask sides), as there is no fragile liquidity to easily break through.
mutation_note: Takes the 'trade flow exhaustion' concept from the parent and adds a regime filter requiring a stable, deep book shape (low concentration on both sides), aiming to isolate the mean-reversion effect in non-trending, liquid environments.
